CustomField.description:
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub.
The total net amount of Housing Opportunity Allocations made to this Property. Only includes those Allocations with a record type of Property Allocation, not Service File Allocations that reference this Property.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total net amount of Housing Opportunity Allocations made to this Property. Only includes those Allocations with a record type of Property Allocation.
CustomField.label: Total Allocations
